---
title: "Skills & Expertise"
subtitle: "Evidence-based capability across research, analytics engineering, and AI-ready systems"
page-layout: article
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    code-fold: false
    code-copy: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="padding:4.5rem 0 2.25rem;">
  <span class="section-eyebrow">Skills</span>
  <h1 class="section-h" style="font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.2rem);margin-top:0.45rem;">What I can build, run, and improve.</h1>
  <p class="section-sub" style="margin-bottom:0;">This page is intentionally specific. I care less about broad claims and more about whether a skill has been used to solve a real delivery, quality, or decision problem.</p>
</div>
```

## Core capability areas

```{=html}
<div class="services-grid" style="margin-top:1.5rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">📐</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Statistics and causal thinking</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Regression, survival analysis, quasi-experimental methods, forecasting, and applied biostatistics for public-interest questions.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>R</span><span>Stata</span><span>Survival analysis</span><span>DiD</span></div>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🗄️</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Data architecture and operations</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">ETL design, validation checks, reproducible reporting, warehouse thinking, and cross-team data handoffs that survive real operations.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>SQL</span><span>PostgreSQL</span><span>ETL</span><span>Git</span></div>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🤖</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">AI and ML systems</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Feature design, model framing, monitoring, and responsible deployment patterns grounded in statistical discipline rather than hype.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>Python</span><span>XGBoost</span><span>Model monitoring</span><span>LLM workflows</span></div>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🌍</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Field data systems</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Survey design, digital tool building, enumerator training, and high-frequency checks across low-connectivity environments.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>ODK</span><span>KoboToolbox</span><span>REDCap</span><span>QA protocols</span></div>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">📊</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Dashboards and evidence translation</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Operational dashboards, reporting automation, and concise outputs for ministries, funders, programme teams, and executives.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>Power BI</span><span>Shiny</span><span>Quarto</span><span>Policy briefs</span></div>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🎓</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Capacity building</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Practical training in R, Stata, reproducible workflows, and data quality habits for teams that need more than one-off analysis help.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>R workshops</span><span>Mentorship</span><span>Documentation</span></div>
  </article>
</div>
```

## Tools and methods

```{=html}
<div class="cv-skill-accordion">
  <details open>
    <summary>Analytics and statistical methods</summary>
    <div class="cv-chip-row">
      <span>R</span><span>Stata</span><span>Python</span><span>SPSS</span><span>Survival analysis</span><span>Forecasting</span><span>Regression</span><span>Causal inference</span>
    </div>
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>Data engineering and infrastructure</summary>
    <div class="cv-chip-row">
      <span>SQL</span><span>PostgreSQL</span><span>ETL design</span><span>Validation checks</span><span>Data QA</span><span>Git workflows</span><span>Reproducible reporting</span>
    </div>
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>AI and machine learning</summary>
    <div class="cv-chip-row">
      <span>XGBoost</span><span>Classification workflows</span><span>Feature engineering</span><span>Model monitoring</span><span>LLM prompt design</span><span>Responsible AI framing</span>
    </div>
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>Field systems and digital data collection</summary>
    <div class="cv-chip-row">
      <span>KoboToolbox</span><span>ODK</span><span>REDCap</span><span>SurveyCTO</span><span>CommCare</span><span>Enumerator training</span><span>High-frequency checks</span>
    </div>
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>Communication and dashboarding</summary>
    <div class="cv-chip-row">
      <span>Power BI</span><span>R Shiny</span><span>Quarto</span><span>R Markdown</span><span>Presentation decks</span><span>Policy briefs</span><span>Executive reporting</span>
    </div>
  </details>
</div>
```

## Evidence of use

| Area | Evidence |
|---|---|
| Data architecture | ETL and quality workflows for 1,000+ household studies and partner dashboards |
| Field systems | Managed tool design, training, and QA across multi-country studies with 50+ field staff |
| Statistics | Mixed-methods and quantitative analysis for health systems, oncology, and impact evaluation work |
| Dashboards | Built Power BI, Quarto, and Shiny outputs for monitoring, reporting, and policy dialogue |
| AI transition | Created portfolio projects in predictive ML, LLM-assisted evidence briefing, and dashboard-driven alerting |

## Current edge

The direction I am sharpening now is the overlap between rigorous research data work and modern data systems:

- reproducible ML and model monitoring
- AI applications that support evidence translation
- data engineering habits that make analytics easier to trust and scale

[See related projects →](../projects/index.qmd){.btn-solid style="margin-top:2rem;display:inline-block;"}
